subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto a servant among the servants, that the rapture of the call of the Lord of Creation might seize him in such wise that no dust shall becloud him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لعبد من العباد لیاخذه جذب ندآء مالک الایجاد علی شان لاتکدره عجاج
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @idolatry
